[Central Baltic] LATVIAN NAV WARN 014/26
CENTRAL BALTIC SEA
LIEPAJA NORTHWARDS.
DRONE EXERCISE IN PROGRESS ON MAY 28 - 29  FROM 0500-1500 UTC IN
 M2 AREA WITH A RADIUS OF 8 NM FROM CENTER PSN N 56-43.00N 020-52.00E.
AREA CLOSED FOR NAVIGATION DURING EXERCISE
 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED
INFORMATION ON RESTRICTIONS ON VHF CH 16
CANCEL THIS MSG ON 291500 UTC MAY
